title: Typewriter - single key - type 1.wav
author: yottasounds
modifications: Fetched the public hq.mp3 preview from the Freesound CDN. Classic typewriter single key — the persona's preferred 'typewriter-key flavor'. Trim to ~30-50ms and normalize to -28 dB. Pitch-randomize +/- 1 semitone in apply-sfx.mjs across digit increments so CountUps don't sound mechanical.
